articles.title: xAI releases Grok-4.3 with native long-horizon agent scaffolding
articles.excerpt: New model demonstrates 4.2× improvement on multi-step software engineering benchmarks and sustains coherent agent trajectories beyond 110k tokens.

articles.title: Figure 03 completes 43-hour autonomous factory shift with zero interventions
articles.excerpt: Humanoid achieves new milestone in unsupervised operation, performing 1,240 unique tasks across three assembly lines at the BMW South Carolina plant.

articles.title: Mira Murati’s Thinking Machines Lab Makes The Technical Case For Human-Centered AI Built On Customizable Model Weights
articles.excerpt: Thinking Machines Lab published "The Future Worth Building Is Human. " The essay frames human participation, model ownership, and decentralized alignment as technical challenges

articles.title: A Coding Guide to NVIDIA’s Tile-Based GPU Programming: From cuTile and Triton Kernels to Flash Attention
articles.excerpt: In this tutorial, we explore NVIDIA tile-based GPU programming with TileGym, building a Colab workflow that runs across different hardware.  We probe the CUDA environment, try the real cuTile backend, and fall back to...

articles.title: Anthropic publishes unprecedented mechanistic interpretability map of Claude 4
articles.excerpt: Researchers reverse-engineered 312 million features inside the model, including the first clear "deception circuit" discovered in a frontier model.

articles.title: Ant Group’s Robbyant Unveils LingBot-VA 2.0: A Causal Video-Action Model Built Natively for Physical AI
articles.excerpt: Ant Group's Robbyant has released the LingBot-VA 2. 0 technical report — a Physical AI video-action foundation model built from scratch for embodiment rather than fine-tuned from a video generator

articles.title: Kyutai Releases MuScriptor: An Open-Weight Decoder-Only Transformer for Multi-Instrument Music Transcription to MIDI
articles.excerpt: MuScriptor is an open-weight, decoder-only Transformer from Kyutai and Mirelo.  Trained on 170k real recordings plus 1
